steps.title: Emphasize dependence
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize Edison's reliance on Hammer. The relevant notes say Edison had little formal schooling and relied on specialist employees for technical work; Hammer was one of those laboratory assistants.

steps.title: Reject unfocused choices
steps.content: Choice A only identifies Hammer's job and workplace. Choice B adds an unsupported broad claim about technology. Choice C emphasizes employees' independent careers, not Edison's reliance. The best sentence connects Edison's limited schooling, his dependence on specialized employees, and Hammer as an example. The answer is D.
